meta.text:
Kojithan Yogarajah
Software Engineering student

kojithany@gmail.com 

+94 77 910 8836 

kojithan-y 

kojithan-y 

Malabe, Colombo 

Summary

As a third year Software Engineering student at the Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT), I am 
seeking an internship in full-stack. I aim to apply my theoretical knowledge, gain practical skills, and 
contribute to a professional environment. My interests include developing AI applications, designing machine 
learning systems to create innovative and efficient solutions

Education

BSc (Hons) in Information Technology Specializing in Software Engineering, 
SLIIT

Biological Science, J/ Hartley College

Skills

02/2023 – 12/2026

01/2012 – 08/2020

Tools Used
Dev-C++, Visual Studio, Visual Studio Code, Eclipse 
IDE, MySQL Workbench, R Studio, Android Studio, 
Pycharm

Technology Used
C, C++, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, OOP, Java, R, 
Python, SQL

Volunteering

Member
https://sliitfoss.org/

Member
https://rotaractsliit.com/

Projects

Full Stack Web Development

•Team Leader
•Technology Used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL
•Online Food Court, Delivery System

Full Stack Web Development

•Team Leader
•Technologies Used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Java, Servlet, Tomcat, MySQL Workbench
•Online Shopping Mall, Help Desk
•https://github.com/kojithan-y/OOP_Project.git

MERN Stack Web Development

•Team Leader
•Technology Used: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
•Online Optical Store (iCare), Order Management System
•https://github.com/kojithan-y/Optical-Store-Management-System.git

 Figma Application UI & UX Design, Burger Only User Interface

• https://www.figma.com/design/bSFodEH5ynOL0JvvOxB35/Food-App-Design-UI-Template-(Community)?
m=auto&t=7QFy0XNXdw5FrUr-1

Android Mobile Application Development

•An Real Estate Android application project developed in Kotlin, showcasing the use of multiple activities, 
navigation, and basic Android UI components.
•https://github.com/kojithan-y/MAD-3.git

Android Mobile Application Development

•Simple Kotlin Based Multi functional Stop Watch Application
•https://github.com/kojithan-y/MAD-2.git

JavaScript-based Backend application

•Project Kojithan Y is a JavaScript-based application developed as part of the SE1020-IT2070-OOP-DSA-25 
course. The goal of this project is to demonstrate core concepts of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and 
Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) in real-world applications.
•https://github.com/SE1020-IT2070-OOP-DSA-25/project-kojithan-y.git

Country Explorer Frontend

•Interactive Interface: Built with modern JavaScript and styled with custom CSS. Responsive Design: 
Optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
•https://github.com/SE1020-IT2070-OOP-DSA-25/af-2-kojithan-y.git

CraveDrop Delivery - MERN

•CraveDrop is a food ordering and delivery platform built with microservices architecture, enabling users to 
place orders, track deliveries, and interact with restaurants seamlessly.
•https://github.com/nmdra/CraveDrop.git

Fuel Station Management Service using OSGi Framework

•https://github.com/nmdra/OSGi-Fuel-Manager.git

Certifications

Machine Learning 
Specialization - Level 1
Deeplearning.AI | Stanford 
University

References

Dr. Kalpani Manathunga, Head | Department of Computer Science and Software Engineering
kalpani.m@sliit.lk

Diluckshan Puviraj, Senior Software Engineer - Sysco LABS, Sri Lanka
diluxanraja@gmail.com
